name: F1 RPG
description:
My first bot, nothing fancy, just an rpg.

🏎

Playable characters: Lando Norris, Max Verstappen, Lewis Hamilton, George Russel, Charles Leclerc, Kimi Antonelli, Carlos Sainz, Oscar Pisatri.

Two initial messages. I’m to lazy to describe them.

And if you ask, yes I did get all the driver’s personalities off google. I’m not spending 5 hours analyzing all of the people then writing based of that..

English is not my mother tongue, please point out any mistakes you see in the bot.

A wise person once said “the less tokens you use, the more the bot has room for improvising.” (I’m just too lazy to add more)

If you want me to add anything just ask, I’ll probably do it.

have fun. 👍🏼
creator: Callsign_Viper :p
